STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DRAIN: A player loses {Damage:diff()} HP. They gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold]. You heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_PASS_: A player exhausts their entire [gold]Hand[/gold]. For each card exhausted, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_YOUR_: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Body Slam+|Body Slam}[/gold] to a player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_EVERY: All players exhaust their [gold]Hands[/gold], then each draws as many cards as they exhausted.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_NO_CA: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Acrobatics+|Acrobatics}[/gold] to a player's [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SERPE: Each living player's [gold]Hand[/gold] is filled to [blue]10[/blue] cards with [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Shivs+|Shivs}[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DEPLO: Each living player [gold]Auto-Plays[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Infinite Blades+|Infinite Blades}[/gold]. Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Phantom Blades+|Phantom Blades}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TOO_M: A player gains {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]No Draw[/gold]. Draw your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [blue]10[/blue] cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BROTH: Each living player [gold]Forges[/gold] {Forge:diff()}. Each living player gains [gold]Brother's Blade[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ORBIT: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each other living player loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold]. Each living player adds a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Orbit+|Orbit}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_MINIO: Transform every card in a player's [gold]Hand[/gold] into a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: Costs X [gold]Stars[/gold]. Each living player gains X/2 {singleStarIcon} (rounded down) and adds an Upgraded [gold]Particle Wall[/gold] and an Upgraded [gold]Alignment[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].

Gain {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. Each living player adds an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Wraith Form+|Wraith Form}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]; it costs [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GROUP: Each living player gains [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold], [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], and [gold]Double Damage[/gold]. Discard their entire [gold]Hand[/gold], then draw [blue]10[/blue] cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BLOOD: You and a player each gain [gold]Sleight of Flesh[/gold]: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take {SleightOfFleshPower:diff()} damage.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CORPS: If the chosen player is dead, set their HP to {Heal:diff()}; otherwise heal {Heal:diff()} HP. They gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Add [gold]Corpse Curse[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].

Unplayable.
[gold]At the end of your turn[/gold], take [blue]99[/blue] damage.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BIASE: Each other living player gains [gold]Energy Bias[/gold]: During their current player phase, whenever they spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], they channel {CalculationBase:diff()} random [gold]Orbs[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHOCK: The chosen player channels [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Orb[/gold]. Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Boot Sequence+|Boot Sequence}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]. Shuffle {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dazed[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_STATU: Exhaust every [gold]Status[/gold] card owned by all players. For each, add a random [gold]Status[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BRAIN: Each living player adds an Upgraded [gold]Creative AI[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ALL_O: All other living players lose all [gold]Energy[/gold]; you gain that much [gold]Energy[/gold]. Gain [gold]Crash[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_FOUR_: All players exhaust their [gold]Hands[/gold]. Each player adds that many random Upgraded [gold]Colorless[/gold] cards to their [gold]Hand[/gold], then fills their [gold]Hand[/gold] to [blue]10[/blue] with [gold]Infection[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SERPE: Each living player adds a [gold]Shiv[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain [gold]Serpent Brotherhood[/gold] (whenever any player plays a [gold]Shiv[/gold], all players gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CHAOS: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each living player adds one Upgraded [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Demon Form[/gold], [gold]Serpent Form[/gold], [gold]Wraith Form[/gold], [gold]Echo Form[/gold], and [gold]Void Form[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TIGER: Each living player takes double damage from [gold]powered Attacks[/gold] this turn. Playing this again multiplies the damage multiplier. Gain [gold]Tiger Flow[/gold]: Whenever you play a card of a different type than the previous one, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: Each living player gains [gold]Shared Fortune[/gold]: Gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_WRIGG: Each living player gains [gold]Energy[/gold] and draws cards equal to floor(current combat round / [blue]3[/blue]).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GAMBL: Each hittable enemy gains [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Bounty Mark[/gold]: When killed, the player who dealt the killing blow gains [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to its Max HP (max {Gold:diff()}).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_COOL_: Each creature gains {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. Kill each creature whose [gold]Doom[/gold] is at least its current HP.
